title: Update Bodyshape Fitness website with correct location, remove incorrect services, add 20th anniversary celebration, and replace all images with actual gym photos

requirements.text: Update the Locations page to display the correct location as Independence, Kentucky instead of Dallas, Texas, including accurate address, phone number (363-8900), and operating hours

quotes: we are locate in indpendence. kentucky not dallas texas

acceptanceCriteria: Locations page shows 'Independence, Kentucky' as the gym location
No references to 'Dallas, Texas' appear anywhere on the website
Phone number 363-8900 is displayed on the Locations page
Address and hours match the Independence, Kentucky location

requirements.text: Remove all references to personal training services from the website, including any mentions in the homepage, services sections, or informational cards
acceptanceCriteria: No text mentioning 'personal training' appears on the homepage
Services section does not list personal training as an offering
Information cards do not reference personal training
All content accurately reflects services actually offered

requirements.text: Remove all Spanish language references and offerings from the website content

quotes: we do not offer spanish in the gym

acceptanceCriteria: No Spanish language content appears anywhere on the site
No references to Spanish language services or support
All content is in English only

requirements.text: Add a prominent 20th anniversary celebration message to the homepage highlighting that Bodyshape Fitness is celebrating 20 years in business this year

quotes: the gym is 20 years old this year is our anniversRY

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage features a visible 20th anniversary celebration message
Anniversary information is prominently displayed in the hero section or near the top of the page
Content emphasizes the milestone of 20 years serving the community

requirements.text: Replace all existing gym images throughout the website with the 20 newly uploaded actual Bodyshape Fitness photos showing the real facility's equipment, spaces, and interior

quotes: you still have pictures of other gyms we do not want those on ther

acceptanceCriteria: All images on the homepage are replaced with the newly uploaded Bodyshape Fitness photos
Image gallery displays only the actual facility photos from the 20 uploaded images
No placeholder or stock gym images remain on the site
All images show real Bodyshape Fitness equipment, including the red Rogue equipment visible in the uploaded photos

requirements.text: Update the gym bio and equipment descriptions to highlight the new/current modern equipment visible in the uploaded photos, emphasizing the quality and variety of equipment available
acceptanceCriteria: Gym description mentions modern, up-to-date equipment
Content references the variety of strength training and cardio equipment shown in the photos
Equipment descriptions align with what is visible in the uploaded facility images

constraints: Do not change backend/main.mo unless business data needs updating
All content must reflect actual services offered at Independence, Kentucky location
Only use the 20 uploaded images as photo sources - no stock or placeholder images
nonGoals: Adding personal training services or references
Including Spanish language content or translations
Keeping Dallas, Texas as a location
Using images from other gyms or facilities
